name: initia-agent
description: Non-custodial AI trading agent marketplace on Initia EVM — monorepo

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @initia-agent/shared && concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --prefix "{name} |" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @initia-agent/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @initia-agent/shared && npm run typecheck -w backend
